description: Refactor the consent/disclosure definitions so each document has an explicit timing gate instead of participating in a single all-or-nothing currentRequiredConsents check. Proposed gates: privacy_notice_before_precheck, telehealth_and_platform_before_mdi, medication_disclosure_before_billing_or_prescribing. Include treatment applicability so compounded-medication disclosure is required only for treatment paths where it applies. Update shared helpers and route/Lambda gate helpers, but do not yet reorder the UI flow.
title: Classify disclosures by onboarding gate
